title: hieracium sonchoides subsp. mairei
intro: Hieracium sonchoides subsp. mairei is a rare plant species commonly known as lesser hawkweed or hawkweed, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium sonchoides subsp. mairei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support wound healing. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's roots, leaves, and flowers can be used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are applied topically to treat various health conditions.
